chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 57 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.1305/2024 (R/Surety) 25.03.2024 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This application is filed by applicant Thanwar Das seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Jai Ram Das, who, on 25.01.2024, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an three original Special Savings Certificates of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated time and obtained pre-arrest bail, as is evident from the trial Court’s order dated 30.01.2024, annexed with this application. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General has extended his no objection for granting this application. Accordingly, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper verification and identification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
